title: Two earbuds screen/second screen, left zoom in/out
scenario: Clicking the left circle button on the second screen toggles zoom and text display
steps: Navigate to the second screen (two earbuds).
Observe the screen zoom in and new text appear.
Click the left circle button again.
Observe the screen zoom out to the original view.
expected: Clicking the left circle button zooms in and displays new text. Clicking it again zooms out to the original screen.
